description.de: Referenz-Stack fuer SEAL-4-orientierte Cloud-Architekturen auf Basis des EU Cloud Sovereignty Frameworks 1.2.1.
description.en: Reference stack for SEAL-4-oriented cloud architectures based on the EU Cloud Sovereignty Framework 1.2.1.

issuer: EU Cloud Sovereignty Framework Working Context

rationale.en: Encryption baseline for data at rest.
Automated configuration management for portable operations.
Open event streaming for decoupled integration architectures.

rationale.de: Open-Source API-Gateway und Proxy fuer serviceorientierte Kommunikation.
rationale.en: Open-source API gateway and proxy for service-oriented communication.

rationale.de: Phishing-resistente MFA fuer IAM im Souveraenitaetskontext.
rationale.en: Phishing-resistant MFA for IAM in sovereignty contexts.
GitOps-based delivery for reproducible deployments.
EU-hostable version control and CI/CD control plane.
Visualization for operations and compliance metrics.

rationale.de: Nur als Uebergangsoption, falls Modelle vollstaendig EU-gehostet betrieben werden.
rationale.en: Transition option only when models are operated in fully EU-hosted setups.
Service mesh for zero-trust and mTLS operating models.
Alternative CI/CD engine for self-hosted pipelines.

rationale.de: Open-Source-IAM fuer OIDC/OAuth2 und EU-konforme Zugriffskontrolle.
rationale.en: Open-source IAM for OIDC/OAuth2 and EU-compliant access control.
Portable orchestration standard for low lock-in deployments.
Open authorization standard for interoperable APIs.

rationale.de: Offener Authentifizierungsstandard fuer Foederation und SSO.
rationale.en: Open authentication standard for federation and SSO.
Policy-as-code for auditable compliance decisions.
Open API descriptions as interoperability baseline.

rationale.de: Offener Standard fuer Telemetrie und nachvollziehbare Observability.
rationale.en: Open telemetry standard for traceable observability.
Sovereign open-source database for core systems.
Metrics standard for monitoring and SLO governance.
AMQP-based messaging alternative in open architectures.

rationale.de: Offener Cache fuer performante, selbst betriebene Plattformdienste.
rationale.en: Open cache for high-performance self-operated platform services.

rationale.de: SCS als europaeischer Referenzrahmen fuer cloud-native Souveraenitaet.
rationale.en: SCS as a European reference framework for cloud-native sovereignty.

rationale.de: IaC fuer reproduzierbare Infrastruktur ohne proprietaere Betriebswerkzeuge.
rationale.en: IaC for reproducible infrastructure without proprietary operations tooling.
Minimum standard for encrypted transport communication.
